description: PHP script with guzzlehttp/psr7 2.1.0 dependency but no code path reaches the vulnerable Utils::readLine(). CVE-2022-24775 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Script only prints a message. No Psr7 Utils code is used at all despite the package being declared as a dependency.

findings.human_justification: No code in the project uses any Psr7 Utils APIs. The package is declared as a dependency but completely unused.
